Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4017 0 0}Perfect timing. I'd like to speak to you for a moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Akihiko is still on the mend, so for now, I'd like you to lead the team in combat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}You never know when a powerful enemy might appear, like the one you faced the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's best to be prepared, or else you may find yourself in a difficult situation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, whenever you'd like to explore Tartarus, just let me know, and I'll gather everyone there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}Also, since I'm sure there are other things you will need to take care of, you have permission to go out at night if you need to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, that's all for now. Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}
